parameters.name: qty
parameters.description: Quantity of data records to delete. Default is 15.

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: Filter data by value. Accepts single or multiple values.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Filter data by id. Accepts single or multiple values.

parameters.name: groups
parameters.description:
Filter data by group. Accepts single or multiple values.
For multiple, send `groups[0]=foo&groups[1]=bar`.
